functions.name: PyPowerFlex.utils.init_logger
documentation:
Initialize logger for PowerFlex client.

```
param log_level

logging level (e. g. logging.DEBUG)

type log_level

int

rtype

None
```

functions.name: PyPowerFlex.utils.filter_response
documentation:
Filter PowerFlex API response by fields provided in `filter_fields`.

Supports only flat filtering. Case-sensitive.

```
param response

PowerFlex API response

param filter_fields

key-value pairs of filter field and its value

type filter_fields

dict

return

filtered response

rtype

list
```

functions.name: PyPowerFlex.utils.query_response_fields
documentation:
Extract specified fields from PowerFlex API response.

```
param response

PowerFlex API response

param fields

fields to extract

type fields

list | tuple

return

response containing only specified fields

rtype

list | dict
```

functions.name: PyPowerFlex.utils.prepare_params
documentation:
Prepare request parameters before sending.

```
param params

request parameters

type params

dict

param dump

dump params to json

return

prepared parameters
```

functions.name: PyPowerFlex.utils.is_version_3
documentation:
Check the API version.

```
param version

Specifies the current API version

return

True if API version is lesser than 4.0

rtype

bool
```

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.service_template.ServiceTemplate.get
documentation:
Retrieve all Service Templates with filter, sort, pagination
\:param filters: (Optional) The filters to apply to the results.
\:param full: (Optional) Whether to return full details for each result.
\:param limit: (Optional) Page limit.
\:param offset: (Optional) Pagination offset.
\:param sort: (Optional) The field to sort the results by.
\:param include_attachments: (Optional) Whether to include attachments.
\:return: A list of dictionary containing the retrieved Service Templates.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.service_template.ServiceTemplate.get_by_id
documentation:
Retrieve a Service Template by its ID.
\:param service_template_id: The ID of the Service Template to retrieve.
\:param for_deployment: (Optional) Whether to retrieve the Service Template for deployment.
\:return: A dictionary containing the retrieved Service Template.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.system.System.add_standby_mdm
documentation:
Add a standby MDM to the system.
\:param mdm_ips: List of ip addresses assigned to new MDM. It can

> contain IPv4 addresses.

```
type mdm_ips

list[str]

param role

Role of the new MDM.

type role

str

param management_ips

List of IP addresses used to manage the MDM.
It can contain IPv4 addresses.

type management_ips

list[str]

param port

Port of new MDM. Default: 9011

type port

str

param mdm_name

Name of the new MDM.

type mdm_name

str

param allow_multiple_ips

Allow the added node to have a different
number of IPs from the primary node.

type allow_multiple_ips

str

param clean

Clean a previous MDM configuration.

type clean

str

param virtual_interface

List of NIC interfaces that will be used
for virtual IP address.

type virtual_interface

list[str]

return

ID of new standby MDM.

rtype

dict
```

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.system.System.remove_standby_mdm
documentation:
Remove a standby MDM from the system.
\:param mdm_id: ID of MDM to be removed.
\:type mdm_id: str
\:return: None

documentation:
Switch cluster mode.

```
param cluster_mode

New mode of MDM cluster

type cluster_mode

str

param add_secondary

List of secondary MDM IDs that will be part of
the cluster. A maximum of two IDs are allowed.

type add_secondary

list[str]

param remove_secondary

List of secondary MDM IDs that will be removed
from the cluster.

type remove_secondary

list[str]

param add_tb

List of TieBreaker MDM IDs that will be part of the
cluster.

type add_tb

list[str]

param remove_tb

List of TieBreaker MDM IDs that will be removed
from the cluster.

type remove_tb

list[str]

return

None
```

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.deployment.Deployment.get
documentation:
Retrieve all Deployments with filter, sort, pagination
\:param filters: (Optional) The filters to apply to the results.
\:param full: (Optional) Whether to return full details for each result.
\:param include_devices: (Optional) Whether to include devices in the response.
\:param include_template: (Optional) Whether to include service templates in the response.
\:param limit: (Optional) Page limit.
\:param offset: (Optional) Pagination offset.
\:param sort: (Optional) The field to sort the results by.
\:return: A list of dictionary containing the retrieved Deployments.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.deployment.Deployment.get_by_id
documentation:
Retrieve Deployment for specified ID.
\:param deployment_id: Deployment ID.
\:return: A dictionary containing the retrieved Deployment.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.deployment.Deployment.validate
documentation:
Validates a new deployment.
Args:
    rg_data (dict): The resource group data to be deployed.
Returns:
    dict: The response from the deployment API.
Raises:
    PowerFlexClientException: If the deployment fails.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.deployment.Deployment.create
documentation:
Creates a new deployment.
Args:
    rg_data (dict): The resource group data to be deployed.
Returns:
    dict: The response from the deployment API.
Raises:
    PowerFlexClientException: If the deployment fails.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.deployment.Deployment.edit
documentation:
Edit a deployment with the given ID using the provided data.
Args:
    deployment_id (str): The ID of the deployment to edit.
    rg_data (dict): The data to use for editing the deployment.
Returns:
    dict: The response from the API.
Raises:
    PowerFlexClientException: If the request fails.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.deployment.Deployment.delete
documentation:
Deletes a deployment with the given ID.
Args:
    deployment_id (str): The ID of the deployment to delete.
Returns:
    str: The response from the delete request.
Raises:
    exceptions.PowerFlexClientException: If the delete request fails.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.firmware_repository.FirmwareRepository.get
documentation:
Retrieve all firmware repository with filter, sort, pagination
\:param filters: (Optional) The filters to apply to the results.
\:param limit: (Optional) Page limit.
\:param offset: (Optional) Pagination offset.
\:param sort: (Optional) The field to sort the results by.
\:param related: Whether to include related entities in the response.
\:param bundles: Whether to include bundles in the response.
\:param components: Whether to include components in the response.
\:return: A list of dictionary containing the retrieved firmware repository.

Retrieve all devices from inventory with filter, sort, pagination
\:param filters: (Optional) The filters to apply to the results.
\:param limit: (Optional) Page limit.
\:param offset: (Optional) Pagination offset.
\:param sort: (Optional) The field to sort the results by.
\:return: A list of dictionary containing the retrieved devices from inventory.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.DeviceTestMode
documentation: SDS devices test modes.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.DrlMode
documentation: SDS drl modes.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.SdsIpRoles
documentation: SDS ip roles.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.PerformanceProfile
documentation: SDS performance profiles.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.AccelerationDeviceInfo
documentation:
PowerFlex acceleration device object.

JSON-serializable, should be used as `acceleration_devices_info` list item
in `Sds.create` method.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.DeviceInfo
documentation:
PowerFlex device object.

JSON-serializable, should be used as `devices_info` list item
in `Sds.create` method.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.RfcacheDevice
documentation:
PowerFlex Rfcache device object.

JSON-serializable, should be used as `rfcache_devices_info` list item
in `Sds.create` method.

classes.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.SdsIp
documentation:
PowerFlex sds ip object.

JSON-serializable, should be used as `sds_ips` list item
in `Sds.create` method or sds_ip item in `Sds.add_sds_ip` method.

methods.name: PyPowerFlex.objects.sds.Sds.create
documentation:
Create PowerFlex SDS.

```
type protection_domain_id

str

type sds_ips

list[dict]

type acceleration_devices_info

list[dict]

type devices_info

list[dict]

param device_test_mode

one of predefined attributes of DeviceTestMode

str

int

param drl_mode

one of predefined attributes of DrlMode

type drl_mode

str

type fault_set_id

str

type force_clean

bool

type force_device_takeover

bool

type name

str

type num_of_io_buffers

int

type rfcache_devices_info

list[dict]

type rmcache_enabled

bool

type rmcache_size_in_kb

int

type sds_port

int

rtype

dict
```
